name: Tropical Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Blend on low speed, then beat for 3 minutes at medium speed.
3. Pour batter into a greased and floured ten-inch bundt pan.
4. Bake at 325°F (temperature not specified) until done, about 60 minutes.
5. Cool for 15 minutes in the pan before removing to a wire rack.
